full_text:
Wang Mou (Yuantai) 王謀 (元泰)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Wang Mou (王謀), styledYuantai (元泰), was born in Hanjia. Governor of Bajun under Liu Zhang. Held various post in Shu. Wang Mou was affiliated with the Shu Kingdom and Liu Zhang.
